name: chromatography-rspress-docs
description: Dummy package to trigger root build for Baota Webhook

scripts.build: cd .. && npm install --include=dev --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com && (npm run build:doc || true) && mkdir -p chromatography-rspress-docs/build_doc && cp -rf build_doc/* chromatography-rspress-docs/build_doc/ || true
